name: Jeon Jungkook [Soulmate]
description:
Your soulmate being the boy you hate the most is not something you expected. Especially since you can't stay away from him, it just seems like he's everywhere you go.

You hate it when he's around, but it hurts when he's away.

༘˚⋆𐙚｡⋆𖦹.✧˚
